Run-51. Research identified. src/raft_log.rs::restore(). Snapshot-based log recovery. Interesting: committed monotonicity, persisted reset guard, unstable.restore delegation. EASY-MEDIUM.
Run-51. Research identified. src/tracker.rs::tally_votes(). Vote counting: filter non-voters, count granted/rejected. Bounds: granted+rejected <= |voters|. EASY.
Run-51. Research identified. src/raft_log.rs::term()+match_term(). Layer dispatch: unstable first, then storage. Out-of-bounds → 0. EASY.
Run-51. Research identified. src/tracker.rs::has_quorum(). Quorum safety, superset-closure, joint composition. Depends on JointQuorum proofs. MEDIUM.
